column1: # Vat.gr.1291, f.5r — Ptolemy, Handy Tables: Oblique Ascensions for Klima V (Byzantium, ~41°N)
# Header: ΚΛΙΜΑΤΟΣ ΔΙΑ ΒΥΖΑΝΤΙΟΥ· ΠΑΡΑΛΛΗΛΟΥ ὧ ἴση ἡ μεγίστη ἡμέρα ιε ...
# Three zodiac signs on this folio: ΚΡΙΟΥ (Aries), ΤΑΥΡΟΥ (Taurus), ΔΙΔΥΜΩΝ (Gemini)
# Columns per sign: degree | ΑΝΑΦΟΡΑΙ (asc. time, deg) | ὩΡΩΝ (hours) | ΧΡΟΝΩΝ (time-degrees)
# Notes: ō = zero (οὐδέν); ϛ = stigma (6); ϟ = koppa (90); θ̄ with bar in column = "9" not letter
# Some cells have a bar over numerals to mark "this is a numeral" — not transcribed separately here.
# === ΤΑΥΡΟΥ (Taurus) — values are CUMULATIVE from start of Aries ===
# === ΔΙΔΥΜΩΝ (Gemini) — cumulative from start of Aries ===
